Walking at a snail's pace through ash storms while being constantly attacked by screeching cliff racers.
Trying to start a car with my friends while a guy in a hockey mask stalks us through the summer camp.
A free fighting game where I get constantly knocked off the screen by someone playing as a cartoon ninja.
A writer fights shadowy monsters in a spooky town using a flashlight and the pages of his own manuscript.
I got time-manipulation powers in a lab accident and now I have to watch a live-action TV show between chapters.
An insanely fast fighting game where screaming anime characters shoot massive energy beams at each other.
A fighting game where a famous superhero in a cape becomes an evil dictator and I can beat him up using a billionaire's gadgets.
A card game where I play famous superheroes at three different locations and constantly lose cubes on the final turn.
Placing increasingly heavily armed monkeys on the map to aggressively pop innocent-looking balloons.
Matching shiny colorful gems in rows of three until my eyes blur and the announcer says 'Excellent!'.
Sorting falling blocks while surrounded by beautiful swimming whales and an intense electronic soundtrack.
Frantically clicking circles to the rhythm of fast-paced anime music until my mouse hand goes completely numb.
Stomping on arrows on a metal pad in the arcade until I'm completely drenched in sweat.
Four friends buy plastic instruments to play in a fake garage band and argue over who gets to play the drums.
Trying to beat a fire-and-brimstone metal song on expert difficulty and immediately failing the intro.
